compiled_state.title: Implement ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh. Script scans all ticket dirs in TRACKER_DIR, calls python3 inline to check if any event file has event_type==ARCHIVED. If yes and .archived marker does not already exist, calls write_marker() from ticket_reducer.marker. Reports count: 'Wrote N markers, skipped M (already present)'. Must be idempotent. Follow ticket-compact-all.sh pattern for discovery + processing. Add executable bit (chmod +x). testing_mode: GREEN (T9 covers behavior).

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Verify: script scans all ticket dirs and creates markers for ARCHIVED tickets
- [ ] Verify: script is idempotent (skips existing markers)
- [ ] Verify: script reports count: 'Wrote N markers, skipped M (already present)'
comments.author: Test
